sources.expression: $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key='_wp_attached_file' AND meta_value LIKE %s", '%' . $modified_url . '%' ) )

sinks.expression:
printf( '

%s

', esc_html__( 'Elementor plugin is required for Qi Addons for Elementor plugin to work properly. Please install/activate it first.', 'qi-addons-for-elementor' ) )
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key='_wp_attached_file' AND meta_value LIKE %s", '%' . $modified_url . '%' ) )

printf(
								// translators: 1. Plugin name; 2. Plugin name; 3. Plugin name.
								esc_html__( 'Wait! Don\'t deactivate %1$s. You have to activate both %2$s and %3$s Premium in order for the plugin to work.', 'qi-addons-for-elementor' ),
								esc_attr( $plugin_name ),
								esc_attr( $plugin_name ),
								esc_attr( $plugin_name )
							)
